title: notifications-in-app — authorization policies
description: The transport reuses `notifications::NotificationDeliveryPolicy` for gating access to individual delivery rows — view/mark-read/dismiss all defer to the parent policy since the row is co-owned. This file declares transport-specific policies ONLY: nothing today.

reused_from_parent.notes: The abilities are declared in the parent policy so that mail / push / sms transports get consistent gating. This module invokes them from its own controllers via $this->authorize(...) rather than duplicating the policy class.
